landing.tagline: Closing the distance between real skills and economic opportunity.
landing.subtitle: If you have skills but no employer knows you exist — UNMAPPED is for you.
landing.moduleDesc1: Map your informal skills to internationally recognised standards.
landing.moduleDesc2: Understand your automation risk and how to build resilience.
landing.moduleDesc3: Find honest, reachable opportunities matched to your actual skills.

wizard.freeText: In your own words, what do you actually do and know how to do?
wizard.competencies: Which of these do you do in your work? (select all that apply)

profile.title: Your Skills Profile
profile.portabilityDesc: How transferable your skills are across borders and sectors

readiness.title: AI Readiness & Displacement Risk
readiness.honestLimits: This assessment uses Frey & Osborne (2013) automation scores calibrated for LMIC context. Automation risk in informal economies is harder to measure than in formal ones — treat this as a directional signal, not a prediction.

dashboard.title: Program Officer Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Aggregate view of skills profiles in this session
dashboard.noProfiles: No profiles yet in this session. Complete the Skills Wizard to start.
